globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https:; worker-src blob:; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
